summary: Stores a boolean value and flips it when banged.
description: Toggle is the performer-facing boolean control. Use Bool when bang should only re-emit the current value; use Toggle when bang should flip the stored state.
runtimeBehavior: in updates and emits, set updates silently, and bang flips the stored boolean before emitting it.

ports.description: Updates the stored boolean and emits it.
Updates the stored boolean without emitting.
Flips the stored boolean and emits the new value.

params.description: Optional typed channel name updated whenever this object emits.
Optional typed channel name used to receive routed updates.

example.title: Bang to flip
example.description: Connect Bang Button to Toggle to see event-triggered state changes.
